title: Command Cockpit Stage Gate
summary: Separated the Command Cockpit from the tactical Map so the selected lane opens as one focused game stage instead of a crowded command stack.
proof: Added tested Cockpit-stage CSS that switches the workspace to a two-column lane rail plus detail layout.
Hid the atlas map only in the Cockpit stage while preserving the dedicated Map teleport as the tactical lane-map level.
Updated README, snapshot generation, regression floors, and trace metadata so the standalone atlas records the stage-gate unlock.
